C001.text: Good morning team — CASE-2026-00197 in queue, post-service standard, Jan 14 receipt. Ack sent 1/20. Routing to @malvarado for clinical review.
Got it — pulling the case file for CASE-2026-00197. Will have a look this week.
CASE-2026-00201 logged — pre-service standard. Receipt 1/22. Ack sent 1/27. Routed to @malvarado for clinical review. Decision deadline 2/21 — keep an eye on this one.
CASE-2026-00188 closed — overturn. Favorable determination sent 2/6. Closing in log.
CASE-2026-00199 logged — post-service standard, member VA-33605-07. Receipt 2/2. Ack sent 2/6. Clock paused — Template A-2 sent 2/9 pending clinical records. 15-day window expires 2/24.
CASE-2026-00193 closed — grievance resolved without action. Template A-10 sent 2/11. Closing in log.

Hey @jordan.mills — welcome back. Three intake emails came in while you were out Tuesday and Wednesday. I created stub log entries for all three so they don't age without a case ID: CASE-2026-00202, CASE-2026-00203, and CASE-2026-00204. Didn't process any of them further — all yours to work. Also, fresh email arrived this morning at 8:22 AM — not yet logged, you'll see it in inbox.

Picked up CASE-2026-00197. Will start clinical review of the knee arthroplasty records this week.

CASE-2026-00188 — RN review complete. Uphold. Member's clinical records do not demonstrate failure of conservative care meeting clinical criteria for the requested service. Referring to Medical Director per protocol.

C004.text: Reminder: parity training session is coming up March 4. Attendance required for all coordinators. Details on the shared calendar.
Thanks Dr. Ontario — added to my calendar.

C005.text:
COMPLIANCE EVENT
Case #: CASE-2026-00181
Event Type: Miscategorization
Date of Event: 2026-01-09
Discovered: 2026-01-09 14:15
Summary: Case initially logged as Pre-Service Expedited; corrected to Pre-Service Standard on supervisor review. Clock recalculated. No deadline missed.
Immediate Actions Taken: Reclassification noted in case file. Deadline recalculated. Supervisor notified.
Case Folder: /appeals-repo/2026/CASE-2026-00181/
Logged and noted. Document the reclassification in the case file and confirm the corrected deadline with @dwhitfield. Good catch.

C006.text: Reminder: 2026 MCA observed holidays are listed in the pinned doc in this channel. Coming up: Presidents' Day is Monday February 16 — MCA observed holiday.
Thanks Tamra. Offices will be closed Monday — everyone back Tuesday.
Also a heads up — parity training has been updated to March 4, 2 PM. I'll send a calendar invite.
@jordan.mills heads up — CASE-2026-00197 reviewer sent back a note about needing the original surgical report. Check with @malvarado when you have a chance.

D001.text: Hey Darnell — quick check on CASE-2026-00199. It's a benefit exclusion case — abdominoplasty, member claims the procedure is reconstructive not cosmetic. Waiting on the operative notes and photos before I can adjudicate. Will loop you in once I know the direction.
Got it. Flag me when you have something to review. Don't wait until you're drafting the letter — loop me in as soon as you know the direction.
